examples: Peridot is given as a symbol of fame, dignity, and protection.
Rhodium-plated pierced earrings with Jonquil crystal lemon and leaf in Peridot crystal.
As brilliant as the stone it's named for, Peridot offers guests an exceptional breakfast, lunch, and dinner.
Only one person survived from all three crews of the Ross Cleveland, St Romanus and the Kingston Peridot.
Chad Brand is the managing partner at Peridot Capital, a Registered Investment Advisory firm out of Pittsburgh.
